case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. EDWARD COLLAR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RUDY GABA JR. PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLAR, EDWARD , AN INDIVIDUAL $888.13 PRINCIPAL, $270.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $82.56 INTEREST, $239.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,479.69, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACE IN PICK-UP BOX)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT COLLAR, EDWARD , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2008
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED JUL-27-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COLLAR, EDWARD , AN INDIVIDUAL
